retained_observations.retained_reason: The gap depends on full-vault active external-report inputs and report-contract summary reuse; public source must not infer private report currentness.
retained_observations.next_action: Add a focused currentness reuse regression after the external-report lifecycle refresh lane is next touched in full-vault context.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when report-contract reuse includes active external-report manifest/action-matrix input drift or an equivalent preflight.

retained_observations.retained_reason: The active action matrix now mixes release authority, artifact freshness, fixture cost, compatibility alias, and external-verification work; closing this observation before lane sequencing would hide the coordination risk.
retained_observations.next_action: Use the active matrix priority order to pick one lane at a time and refresh the matrix/currentness evidence after each completed lane.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the active matrix no longer needs a separate priority coordination note because the remaining active actions have current owner lanes and blocking scopes.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Artifact freshness correctly reports source-identity drift after ordinary source edits, but the current operator-facing stale summary does not separate that cheap routing case from schema, contract, feedback-loop, or release-authority debt.
retained_observations.next_action: Add a lightweight stale-cause classifier or planner hook that routes source_identity_only freshness debt to release-finality-resettle or post-commit checking instead of broad release convergence.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when freshness/fixed-point reporting distinguishes source_identity_only stale records from actionable schema/contract/feedback debt and focused tests cover the routing.

retained_observations.retained_reason: The latest resettle could regenerate finality attestation after the terminal freshness/action-matrix pass, leaving freshness evidence slightly out of phase with a freshly written payload.
retained_observations.next_action: Move finality attestation before the last freshness/action-matrix pass or add a post-scan writer drift check with a targeted recommended lane.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when fixed-point or static coverage prevents freshness-sensitive writers from running after terminal freshness evidence without recomputing freshness/action-matrix state.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Compatibility alias cleanup is intentionally incremental because removing flat imports without caller inventory would turn a maintenance lane into a broad interface migration.
retained_observations.next_action: Update the compatibility-alias inventory on the next touched hotspot and migrate only verified callers in that ownership boundary.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the compatibility-alias inventory has no remaining flat import re-export entries or each remaining alias has an explicit retained support contract.

retained_observations.retained_reason: This is the umbrella execution guard for the current long-term active-matrix cleanup; closing it would encourage new narrative reports instead of lane work.
retained_observations.next_action: Continue burning down the existing active lanes through code, tests, currentness artifacts, and release/supply-chain evidence instead of adding new planning reports.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the active matrix blockers are either resolved, explicitly operator-dependent, or represented by narrower retained observations.
